sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LEGMC) via MeteoAlarm
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre / EUMETNET MeteoAlarm
sources.notes: Official Latvian weather warnings (CAP/GeoJSON) distributed through the EUMETNET MeteoAlarm network. LEGMC (LVGMC) is the national alerting authority. Covers wind, snow/ice, thunderstorm, heat, flood, coastal event awareness levels.
FDSN event web service filtered to the Latvian land bbox (55.6-58.1 N, 20.9-28.3 E). Latvia has very low seismicity; USGS feed is the fallback authoritative source for regional tectonic events.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LEGMC / LVGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre
sources.notes: LEGMC national weather warnings portal (bridinajumi.meteo.lv). Public page; structured data also published to MeteoAlarm (see lv-meteoalarm-warnings). Open data mirrored to data.gov.lv.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LEGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre
sources.notes: LEGMC open-access Baltic Sea marine data browser — marine meteorology forecasts, waves, ice and water levels for the Latvian coast (Gulf of Riga, Baltic proper). Public, part of CMEMS regional products.

ENTSO-E RESTful API for the Latvian control area (AST, domain 10Y1001A1001A50U). Requires a free registered security token (api-key). Provides load, generation, cross-border physical flows and day-ahead prices.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LEGMC / LVGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre
sources.notes: LEGMC environmental centre portal for hydrological observations (river levels, flows), water quality and air quality monitoring across Latvia. Public open data; structured feeds mirrored to data.gov.lv.

sources.authority: GDACS (Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System)
sources.notes: Multi-hazard (earthquake, flood, cyclone, volcano, drought) event list. Can filter by country=LV. Useful as a regional cross-check for earthquakes and large flood events affecting the Baltic region.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC/LEGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC)
sources.notes: LVGMC open-data ArcGIS REST service for 100-year sea wind flood risk zones. Returns ESRI JSON features with flood extent polygons for the Latvian coast (Baltic Sea, Gulf of Riga). Confirmed 200 application/json via f=json parameter. Part of the EU Floods Directive national flood risk assessment.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC/LEGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC)
sources.notes: LVGMC open-data ArcGIS REST service for 100-year spring flood risk zones. Returns ESRI JSON features with flood extent polygons for Latvian river basins. Confirmed 200 application/json via f=json. Part of the national flood risk management plan under the EU Floods Directive.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC/LEGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC)
sources.notes: LVGMC operational meteorological observations as CSV via the Latvian National Open Data Portal (data.gov.lv). Contains hourly station measurements (temperature, humidity, wind, precipitation) from the national meteo station network. Confirmed 200 text/csv.

sources.authority: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC/LEGMC)
sources.attribution: Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre (LVGMC)
sources.notes: LVGMC operational lightning stroke grid data as CSV via the Latvian National Open Data Portal (data.gov.lv). Contains cloud-to-cloud and cloud-to-ground lightning discharge counts per grid cell. Confirmed 200 text/csv. Relevant for thunderstorm/fire-weather monitoring.
